Manual review required for ABAP statement: // There's a predefined set of SAP annotations. Their specification is optional

Manual review required for ABAP statement: @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'currency' abap.curr'12.34' as curr, abap.dec'0.9' as discnt, abap.unit'KM' as kilometers, // Untyped literals 'Minutes' as flti
Manual review required for ABAP statement: // The name of the parameter must be prefixed by $parameters
Manual review required for ABAP statement: $parameters.p_smax as param, // -------- Session variables -------- // Among other sesion variables, there are built-in session variables available

Manual review required for ABAP statement: $session.user as usr, $session.client as clnt, $session.system_language as langu, $session.system_date as sys_date, $session.user_timezone as usr_time, $session
Manual review required for ABAP statement: // -------- Cast expressions -------- // Convert the value of operands to a specified type after as // The examples use built-in data types only
Manual review required for ABAP statement: // Note: Regarding which conversion combinations of types are possible, see the ABAP Keyword Documentation
Manual review required for ABAP statement: // There are special conversion rules for every combination
Manual review required for ABAP statement: cast( price as abap.dec(15,2) ) as cast_curr2dec, // The following example uses the prefix $projection. which defines reuse expressions
Manual review required for ABAP statement: // That is, you can refer to an element defined previously in the element list of the same CDS view entity
Manual review required for ABAP statement: // Note that this is only possible in dedicated positions. One of them is a cast expression

Manual review required for ABAP statement: cast( $projection.date_lit as abap.char(8) ) as cast_dats2c, // -------- Arithmetic expressions -------- seatsocc_b + seatsocc_f as occ_seats_classes, seatsmax
Manual review required for ABAP statement: // The first operand specified after THEN for which the comparison is true is // returned as a result. No match: Result is determined by the ELSE branch
Manual review required for ABAP statement: case currency when 'EUR' then 'X' when 'USD' then 'Y' else 'Z' end as case1, // You can use the ELSE NULL addition that returns the null value
Manual review required for ABAP statement: // Note: If ELSE is not specified, the null value is returned as a result

Manual review required for ABAP statement: case $projection.case1 when 'X' then 'A' else null end as case2, // Complex case distinction (searched case) for evaluating conditions case when seatsmax <= 150
Manual review required for ABAP statement: //Comparison operators // Boolean operators AND, OR, NOT as well as parenthesized expressions are possible

Manual review required for ABAP statement: case when seatsmax = 385 and not ( seatsocc > 380 and seatsocc <> 379 or seatsocc <= 120 or paymentsum >= 200000 ) then 'A' //Interval comparisons when seatsmax
